name: Pickle Spot Indoor Courts
description:
Opened April 2024! New indoor pickleball facility in Orange, CT! Featuring 5, full-size, dedicated courts. Fully climate controlled. 
Offering instructional clinics and open play daily. Offering Junior's programming and Kid's Camps. Special events, league and tournament play. Facility available for private or corporate events. Featuring Pro Shop and refreshment counter with snacks and beverages. Locker rooms with shower. Selkirk sponsored facility . USA Pickleball Member Club.
Memberships available but not required.

name: Shoreline Pickleball
description: Shoreline Indoor Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in the area. There are 5 indoor CUSHIONED courts built to Official Pickleball specifications in 2023. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, wheelchair accessibility, lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights. Reservations are required , members get reduced rates as well as early booking privileges.  We book through Court Reserve , organization: Shoreline PB.  Play as a member or non-member.  Great summer specials being offered, senior socials, fun leagues, social events, coaching and more.  Private events and corporate outings are a fun way to bring your group together at Shoreline.
open_play_schedule: evening leagues, open plays , private court rentals, events, clinics, lessons
